description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- Attribute performance reports via JS self-profiling and denoise long-task prompts / 性能报告接入采样归因并为长任务提示降噪 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6374
- fix(desktop): add right-click copy menu for selected transcript text / 修复转录区选中文本右键无复制菜单 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6375
- Harden delivery-mode review protocol, gating, and streaming liveness / 加固交付模式 review 协议、门槛判定与流式活性 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6382
- feat(creation): polish workspace dock changes view by @Li-Charles-One in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6287
- feat(creation): polish sidebar/dock alignment and chat scrollbar by @Li-Charles-One in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6292
- Make reasonix setup a provider manager / 将 reasonix setup 改为供应商配置中心 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6384
- fix(desktop): resized composer input collapses to a single line / 修复调整过高度的输入框固定只显示一行 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6399
- fix(creation): scale fixed font sizes with interface text size by @Li-Charles-One in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6400
- fix(desktop): repaint creation transcript after turn-actions removal by @J3y0r in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6365
- fix(plugin): support marketplace preflight without Windows console flashes / 支持市场预检并消除 Windows 黑框 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6405
- fix(desktop): keep live cache averages in sync / 修复实时缓存平均命中率同步 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6406
- fix(delivery): align sign-off verification with final readiness / 修复交付验证与最终检查不一致 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6407
- fix(evidence): reject file-writing test-runner flags in verification classifier / 验证分类器拒绝会写文件的测试运行器参数 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6409
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.17.11...desktop-v1.17.12
